description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a license_scanning job in the test stage using the Docker image $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/license_finder:latest with an empty entrypoint. In the before_script install Poetry with pip, export the Poetry lock to poetry_requirements.txt, strip hash comments using sed, filter out click-default-group, pyhocon and watchdog entries with grep, and write the final requirements.txt. In the script execute "/run.sh analyze . | tee -a license_management.log" and in the after_script echo the tail of license_management.log. Configure the job to always publish license_management.log as an artifact and the file gl-license-scanning-report.json as a license_scanning report, allow failure, and set job variables LM_REPORT_VERSION='2.1' and SETUP_CMD from $LICENSE_MANAGEMENT_SETUP_CMD; also define global variables LICENSE_FINDER_CLI_OPTS and LICENSE_MANAGEMENT_SETUP_CMD. Add rules so the job runs only when $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH is present and the GitLab feature "license_scanning" is enabled, and never runs when $LICENSE_MANAGEMENT_DISABLED is true.
